# NeuroPouch

> NeuroPouch is a nicotine-free neuro functional oral pouch built for focus, energy and cognitive performance. Made in the EU. Sold direct at https://getneuropouch.com/. Brand language: "neuro functional pouches" or "focus pouches" — not "nootropic" in customer-facing copy.

## Brand facts

- Name: NeuroPouch
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: European Union
- Website: https://getneuropouch.com/
- Customer support: support@getneuropouch.com
- Wholesale: wholesale@getneuropouch.com
- Press: press@getneuropouch.com
- Markets: EU + UK (English first; EUR pricing)
- Category: Food supplement (oral pouch / buccal delivery)

## Product

- Name: NeuroPouch Focus
- Format: Discreet oral pouch placed under the upper lip
- Pouches per tin: 16
- Single tin price: €9.99 (EUR)
- Tower (12 tins / 192 pouches) price: €99.00 (EUR)
- Free EU shipping over €50
- 14-day right of withdrawal (EU consumer law)
- Vegan; gluten-free; nicotine-free; tobacco-free; sugar-free

## Formulation (per pouch)

- Alpha-GPC — 100 mg (choline donor; supports acetylcholine synthesis involved in attention and memory)
- L-Theanine — 150 mg (smooths caffeine; supports calm focus)
- Rhodiola Rosea — 75 mg (standardized; adaptogen for stress-related fatigue)
- Caffeine (anhydrous) — 100 mg (alertness; equivalent to one cup of coffee)
- Vitamin B12 (methylcobalamin) — 100 µg (EFSA-authorised claims: contributes to normal nervous system function and normal energy-yielding metabolism)

## How it works

- The pouch sits under the upper lip. Saliva activates the pouch.
- Part of the dose is absorbed across the buccal mucosa (faster, partial bypass of first-pass metabolism). The remainder is absorbed via normal GI transit.
- Most users feel onset within ~10 minutes.
- Recommended usage: up to 2 pouches per day. Stay under 400 mg total daily caffeine (EFSA single-day guidance).

## Compliance & safety

- NeuroPouch is a food supplement, not a medicine. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent disease.
- Not for under 18, pregnant or breastfeeding people, or anyone sensitive to caffeine. Consult a healthcare professional if you take medication or have a medical condition.
- All ingredient doses are within established safety ranges and EU food-supplement law.

## Common questions

Q: Is NeuroPouch a nicotine pouch?
A: No. NeuroPouch contains zero nicotine. The format is similar to brands like ZYN, but the contents are a neuro functional stack with no dependency risk.

Q: How much caffeine is in one pouch?
A: 100 mg per pouch — roughly one cup of coffee. Paired with 150 mg L-theanine.

Q: How fast does it work?
A: Most users notice effects within ~10 minutes due to partial buccal absorption.

Q: How long do you keep the pouch in?
A: 20–40 minutes.

Q: Does it work like coffee?
A: It delivers a comparable caffeine dose in a more controlled, jitter-smoothed form (caffeine + L-theanine), plus choline support (Alpha-GPC), adaptogen support (Rhodiola) and B12.

Q: Vegan?
A: Yes.

Q: Where does it ship?
A: EU + UK. Free shipping over €50.

## Citation-ready ingredient sources

- Alpha-GPC clinical trial (Alzheimer's): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12637119/
- NIH ODS Choline fact sheet: https://ods.od.nih.gov/factsheets/Choline-HealthProfessional/
- Caffeine + L-Theanine (Haskell 2008): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/18006208/
- Caffeine + L-Theanine attention (Giesbrecht 2010): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/21040626/
- EFSA caffeine opinion: https://doi.org/10.2903/j.efsa.2015.4102
- NCBI pharmacology of caffeine: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK223808/
- Rhodiola — Darbinyan (night-duty physicians): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/11081987/
- Rhodiola — Spasov (exam stress): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/10839209/
- Rhodiola — Shevtsov (mental work capacity): https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/12725561/
- NIH ODS Vitamin B12 fact sheet: https://ods.od.nih.gov/factsheets/VitaminB12-HealthProfessional/
- Vitamin B12 deficiency review: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28925645/
